_comment: Layer-Shift config - the ONLY place chain/backend wiring lives. Addresses below were VERIFIED ON-CHAIN 2026-07-19 (bytecode + symbol()) before entry per DEFI_REVIEW.md: SMOKE on Base, DIAMONDS + GOLD on Ethereum mainnet. backend_base_url stays empty until scripts/deploy-backend.sh runs (Cloudflare token needs account access).

contract_chains._note: Cross-chain: wallet-provider eth_call only sees the wallet's current chain, so balance checks go through the backend /balances endpoint (stateless, read-only).
